nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them, ‘When you enter the land where you are to live, which I am giving you,

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you come into the land you are to inhabit, which I am giving you,

cnv.text: “你要告訴以色列人：你們進入我賜給你們居住之地的時候，

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉以色列人。 “你们进入耶和华赐给你们的那片土地后，
